title: Synthetic Goal Chime
creator: XinOne project
generation: uv run python tools/sound/sfx_generator.py --input-file scores/hockey-goal.mml --style sine --fm --fm-ratio 2.0 --fm-index 1.2 --attack 0.002 --decay 0.08 --sustain 0.25 --release 0.1 --volume 0.85 -o games/hockey/assets/audio/sfx/goal
